login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Subscriber portal
login.note: Use your internet (PPPoE) username and password.
login.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
login.errorDisabled: This account is disabled. Contact your ISP for help.
login.errorNetwork: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

home.title: My account
home.loadError: Couldn't load your account. Please try again.
home.cardPendingBody: Your 1-day trial is active while your payment is verified. It expires at {time} if not approved sooner.

usage.title: Usage
usage.loadError: Couldn't load this. Please try again.

renew.title: Renew
renew.resumePending: You have a payment in progress — tap to continue
renew.reconnectNote: Reconnecting may take a moment if you're online.

voucher.label: Voucher code
voucher.hint: Enter the code exactly as printed.

error.used: This voucher has already been used.
error.void: This voucher was cancelled by your provider.
error.invalid: That code doesn't look right. Check it and try again.
error.network: Couldn't reach the server. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

gateway.startError: Couldn't start the payment. Please try again.
gateway.allDownTitle: Online payment isn't available right now
gateway.allDownBody: You can still renew instantly with a voucher.

card.pendingBody: Pending ISP verification — active until {time} if not approved sooner.

error.cooldown: Please wait before submitting another card.
error.network: Couldn't reach the server. Please try again.
error.invalid_code: That card type isn't accepted. Pick a card type from the list and try again.
error.no_profile: Your account has no plan to renew — please contact your provider.
error.already_pending: You already have a card payment pending verification.
error.generic: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.

return.pendingBody: We're confirming your payment. This can take a moment — you don't need to do anything.
return.failedBody: The payment didn't go through. You can try again or use a voucher instead.

settings.title: Account settings
settings.passwordWarning: Changing your password also changes your internet (PPPoE) login password.

error.generic: Couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

pwa.offline: No connection — showing the last data we have.
pwa.installAndroidBody: Add this to your home screen for quick, full-screen access.
pwa.installIosBody: Tap Share, then "Add to Home Screen", for quick, full-screen access.
